items.title: Bahamas police search for US woman who reportedly fell off boat
items.dek: Her husband told authorities she fell out of their dinghy on Saturday night and was swept out to sea.
items.body: Her husband told authorities she fell out of their dinghy on Saturday night and was swept out to sea.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: One gunman killed and two injured in shooting at Israeli consulate in Istanbul
items.dek: No Israeli diplomats are currently in Turkey and the Istanbul consulate has been empty for the past two-and-a-half years.
items.body: No Israeli diplomats are currently in Turkey and the Istanbul consulate has been empty for the past two-and-a-half years.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mum of twins who says home was bombed in Lebanon speaks to BBC
items.dek: More than one million people in Lebanon have been displaced since the start of the war as Israel expands its ground operation there.
items.body: More than one million people in Lebanon have been displaced since the start of the war as Israel expands its ground operation there.
items.author: IriLine Desk
